svg.text: DepMap dependency landscape — 30 cell lines × 30 genes (subset of ~21k × ~1k)

g.text: Chronos gene effect score (Blue = essential, white = non-essential)
Lineage-selective dependencies = drug targets. Pan-essential = avoid (would kill normal cells too).
DepMap public release: ~21,000 genes × ~1,000 cell lines via Chronos algorithm. Browse at depmap.org.
